allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({a: z.string\(\)}\); const r = s.safeParse\({}\); if \(!r.success\) { console.log\(Object.keys\(r.error\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.error.issues || r.error.errors, null, 2\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({a: z.string\(\)}\); const r = s.safeParse\({}\); if \(!r.success\) { console.log\(typeof r.error.issues, Array.isArray\(r.error.issues\)\); console.log\(r.error.issues[0]\); }")
